en: I heard that you're settled down, that you
Found a girl and you're married now.
I heard that your dreams came true.
Guess she gave you things I didn't give to you.
ko: 그녀는 내가 너에게 주지 못한 것을 주었겠지.

en: Oh, friend, why are you so shy?
Ain't like you to hold back or hide from the light.
ko: 넌 이런 식으로 숨거나 빛을 피하는 사람이 아니잖아.

en: I hate to turn up out of the blue, uninvited, but I couldn't stay away. I couldn't fight it. I had hoped you'd see
ko: 갑자기 나타나서 invitaiton 없이 왔지만 못 참겠어, 이겨낼 수가 없더라. 네가

en: My face and that you'd be reminded that for me it isn't over.
ko: 내 얼굴을 보고 나에 대해 아직 끝나지 않았다는 것을 기억하리라는 걸 바랐어.
